title: Tramontina Premium Teak Wood End Grain Chopping Board - 45x34x3cm | Versatile Kitchen Cutting, Pizza, Cheese, and Serving Board
features: GENEROUS DIMENSIONS: With a spacious 45cm length, 34cm width, and substantial 3cm thickness, this large wooden chopping board provides ample room for all your culinary creations. Its generous size makes it perfect for large pizza servings, elaborate cheese boards, serving up juicy burgers, and extensive food preparation tasks.

END GRAIN & MICROBIAL PROTECTION: Unlike regular face-grain boards, our end-grain design is simply stunning to look at. What's more, this wooden chopping board boasts a beautiful finish while also offering microbial protection thanks to its mineral oil coating.
DEEP JUICE RIM: A must-have for steak connoisseurs and anyone who loves to keep their culinary workspace clean. The deep juice rim captures every savoury drop, ensuring mess-free meal preparation.

VERSATILE AND PRACTICAL: Whether you're prepping ingredients, presenting a culinary masterpiece, or using it as a pizza board, cheese board, or kitchen board, this versatile kitchen accessory excels in every role. It's equally at home in your indoor and outdoor dining spaces.
PERFECT GIFT: Searching for a gift that combines elegance and functionality? Look no further! This wooden chopping board makes an ideal present for food enthusiasts and home chefs.
description: Product Description Tramontina Churrasco Roasting Board 45 x 35 x 3 cm The Tramontina Churrasco Roasting Board is rectangular and made from teak wood with oil finish. It is the practical and convenient addition to your kitchen. You will get a rustic atmosphere and full of personality when serving pizza or any meal, making the presentation much prettier and looking much tastier. Measurements: The Churrasco table has measurements of: 45 x 35 x 3 cm. Its size makes it a very good and necessary addition to your kitchen. A different touch With this roasting board you can give your table a different look. Teak wood makes it an elegant and sophisticated choice that will give your kitchen that unique touch. Teak Wood This board is made from the highest quality materials. The board is made of teak wood with oil finish. Your best recipes With the Tramontina Churrasco board you can prepare your best recipes, especially roasted, in a very healthy and fast way, and become a great host for special celebrations and also for everyday life. Made in Brazil The Tramontina Churrasco board is manufactured in one of the 9 factories that Tramontina has in Brazil. Official Tramontina product Tramontina products are made with the best materials to ensure the smooth operation and durability of all your items.
